entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Cultivated peanut (Arachis hypogaea L.), an allotetraploid valued for its edible oil and digestible protein

entities.name: ALLOTETRAPLOID
entities.description: The genomic state of cultivated peanut characterized as AABB, 2n = 4x = 40

entities.name: EDIBLE OIL
entities.description: A valued nutritional component of the peanut seed

entities.name: DIGESTIBLE PROTEIN
entities.description: A valued nutritional component of the peanut seed

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: An agronomical trait that significantly influences yield and nutritional composition

entities.name: SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: An agronomical trait that significantly influences yield and nutritional composition

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total production of the crop, influenced by seed-related traits

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL COMPOSITION
entities.description: The nutritional makeup of the peanut, influenced by seed-related traits

entities.name: ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: A powerful approach for exploring the genetic basis of important traits in plants

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Single-locus simple sequence repeat markers used to identify associations with traits

entities.name: LINKAGE DISEQUILIBRIUM
entities.description: The non-random association of alleles at different loci, which decays with genetic distance

entities.name: GENETIC DISTANCE
entities.description: The measure of genetic divergence between loci

entities.name: B SUBGENOME
entities.description: One of the subgenomes in the allotetraploid peanut

entities.name: A SUBGENOME
entities.description: One of the subgenomes in the allotetraploid peanut

entities.name: MIXED LINEAR MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model used with population structure and kinship to detect significant markers

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE
entities.description: The distribution of genetic variation within a population

entities.name: KINSHIP
entities.description: The genetic relationship between individuals in a population

entities.name: AHGA44686
entities.description: A specific SSR marker associated with seed length and hundred-seed weight

entities.name: SEED LENGTH
entities.description: A seed-related trait associated with marker AHGA44686

entities.name: HUNDRED-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: A seed-related trait associated with marker AHGA44686

entities.name: FAVORABLE ALLELES
entities.description: Specific versions of associated markers that enhance trait performance

entities.name: PEANUT BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: A program aimed at improving peanut varieties using associated markers
